---
title: "Causal Inference for Earth System Science"
author: "Wenbo Lv"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: "16:9"
    seal: false
---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_01.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_02.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_03.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_04.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_05.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_06.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_07.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_08.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_09.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_10.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_11.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_12.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_13.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_14.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_15.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_16.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_17.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_18.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_19.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_20.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_21.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_22.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_23.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_24.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_25.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_26.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_27.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_28.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_29.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain

---
class: center, middle
background-image: url("./fig/fig_30.png")
background-position: center
background-size: contain
